image:image.image:caption: Mt. Diablo and its rocky North Peak rise above the wooded Lamorinda hills east of Lafayette, California — a familiar view from many Lafayette neighborhoods. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout Lafayette.
image:image.image:title: Mt. Diablo from Lafayette — Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: Sailboats and motorboats moored at the Martinez Marina along the Carquinez Strait, in Martinez, California. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout Martinez.
image:image.image:title: Martinez Marina — Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: The Pleasant Hill War Memorial, a white art deco tower with a soldier relief sculpture flanked by the American and California state flags, in Pleasant Hill, California. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout Pleasant Hill.
image:image.image:title: Pleasant Hill War Memorial — Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: Bronze sculpture of children dancing in a circle in downtown Clayton, California, with historic Main Street storefronts and the American and California state flags in the background. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout Clayton.
image:image.image:title: Downtown Clayton — Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: A white livestock guardian dog stands watch over a herd of grazing goats on a dry-grass hillside in El Sobrante, California — a familiar East Bay scene. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout El Sobrante.
image:image.image:title: El Sobrante hillsides — Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: The 'Welcome to City of Pinole' stone monument sign with the city seal and civic emblems, surrounded by garden landscaping, in Pinole, California. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout Pinole.
image:image.image:title: Welcome to Pinole — Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: Twin fountains rise from a tranquil lake beside a lattice dome shelter at Refugio Valley Park in Hercules, California. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout Hercules.
image:image.image:title: Refugio Valley Park — Bennett Veterinary Service

image:image.image:caption: The Piedmont Park Exedra, a stone arched pavilion with a bronze sculpture in its central niche, framed by oak trees and wooden benches, in Piedmont, California. Dr. Bennett provides in-home veterinary care and pet euthanasia throughout Piedmont.
image:image.image:title: Piedmont Park Exedra — Bennett Veterinary Service
